name: @tank/solidity-mastery
description: Solidity smart contract development, security, and tooling for EVM chains. Covers Solidity 0.8.x patterns, security vulnerabilities (reentrancy, flash loans, audit checklists), gas optimization, ERC standards (ERC-20/721/1155/4626), upgradeable contracts (UUPS, transparent proxy), Foundry toolchain (forge test, script, fuzz/invariant testing), OpenZeppelin 5.x, and multi-chain deployment.
